title: Your First Compose File
story: Running multi-container apps with `docker run` is painful. Docker Compose lets you define everything in one YAML file. Write a Compose file that runs a single `nginx` service.
objectives: Write `/workspace/docker-compose.yml` with one service: `web` using image `nginx:latest`, no port mapping yet
hints: A Compose file has a `services:` key at the top level
Write the file, then `docker compose -f /workspace/docker-compose.yml up -d`
